title: globularia vulgaris subsp. willkommii
intro: Globularia vulgaris subsp. willkommii, also known as Willkomm's globularia, is a plant species within the globularia genus, specifically a subspecies of the common globe daisy. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing antioxidant effects. Globularia vulgaris subsp. willkommii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a dried herb, and is also used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
